patch.value: Pin release dependency ranges for Dependabot hygiene

Replace direct latest dependency specs with deterministic semver ranges and publish a same-day follow-up release so GitHub Dependabot resolves the undici manifest alerts against a pinned safe version.

package.json no longer uses latest dependency specs; undici resolves to a non-vulnerable pinned range; changelog and release notes mention the dependency hygiene release; release workflow publishes and verifies the follow-up package.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Duplicate check before create: pm context --limit 10 showed only audit parent pm-3fti and tracker hygiene; pm search 'dependabot undici latest dependency manifest' found older closed Dependabot tasks and no active item for the current GitHub advisory banner; pm list-open/list-in-progress found no active dependency release hygiene item. Net-new issue is required for the same-day follow-up release.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: GitHub Dependabot open alerts 1-3 all target undici in package.json; lockfile resolves undici 8.1.0,but the published manifest uses latest,which is nondeterministic and should be pinned.

value.note: document deterministic dependency range release requirement
pin dependency ranges and bump follow-up release version
lockfile specifiers match pinned dependency ranges

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Implemented dependency release hygiene follow-up: bumped package version to 2026.5.1-2, replaced all direct latest dependency specs with explicit SemVer ranges, kept undici on non-vulnerable ^8.1.0, updated pnpm-lock specifiers, CHANGELOG.md, and docs/RELEASING.md. Evidence: node scripts/release-version.mjs check --tag v2026.5.1-2 --verify-next --date 2026.5.1 passed; pnpm security:scan passed; pnpm audit --audit-level low found no known vulnerabilities; pnpm build and pnpm typecheck passed; npm pack --dry-run produced @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.5.1-2; pnpm smoke:npx passed; pm test pm-q71q --run --progress passed coverage with 81 files, 1087 tests, 100% coverage; no direct latest dependency specifiers remain.

value.author: codex-release-agent
value.text: Release evidence: v2026.5.1-2 workflow 25212693114 completed successfully at fd5efa08808c62efdd96c0042cb15f3e52ab1696; GitHub release https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/releases/tag/v2026.5.1-2 published; npm registry reports @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.5.1-2 with integrity sha512-Xx+VDM17CBtI0tcGz/oOelkdcTnrNISSXUuS+QjymEr55ksMFjdtRT/7bl6lkYQfPHITudqOGcvBaxVvjgXOng==; npm latest is 2026.5.1-2; npx and bunx both returned 2026.5.1-2; Dependabot open-alert query returned no open alerts.

patch.value: Pinned all direct latest dependency specifiers to deterministic SemVer ranges and published the 2026.5.1-2 same-day follow-up through the tag-driven release workflow.
No direct latest dependency specifiers remain; undici resolves to the non-vulnerable ^8.1.0 range; npm/npx/bunx/GitHub release all verify 2026.5.1-2; Dependabot reports no open alerts.

package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml use deterministic ranges; release workflow 25212693114 succeeded; GitHub release v2026.5.1-2 is published; npm latest is 2026.5.1-2; npx and bunx return 2026.5.1-2; Dependabot open-alert query is clean.
2026.5.1-2 published and verified; dependency ranges pinned; Dependabot open-alert query clean; release workflow 25212693114 passed.
